_comment: Vercel deploys the frontend (Vite SPA). The 'rootDirectory' in Vercel's UI should be set to 'client'. This file pins build settings so they don't drift.
buildCommand: cd client && npm install && npm run build

rewrites._comment: SPA fallback: every URL returns index.html so React Router takes over

headers._comment: Don't cache index.html — must reflect new deploys immediately
